name: GOLFTEC West LA
address: 3130 S Sepulveda Blvd Suite C, Los Angeles, CA 90034
about: GOLFTEC is a technology-driven golf instruction and practice facility that utilizes advanced motion measurement systems like OPTIMOTION and high-speed video analysis to provide data-backed coaching. The company operates across multiple locations and offers services including private lessons, club fitting, and supervised practice sessions with personalized training plans. GOLFTEC focuses on structured improvement through its proven system, which includes a Swing Evaluation to create a customized game plan for golfers of all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using advanced motion capture technology
Personalized improvement plans tailored to individual goals
Access to high-tech training bays with launch monitors and video feedback

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site bar or alcohol service mentioned

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced launch monitors mentioned for club fitting and practice, but specific brand not specified

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides all necessary equipment for lessons and fittings, but you are welcome to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are permitted, but the pro shop offers gear and accessories for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Standard 18-hole simulation sessions typically take 2-3 hours depending on player pace and simulator wait times.

faq.question: Is GOLFTEC kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and welcomes young golfers with age-appropriate instruction and equipment.
